programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban searches for evidence that extraterrestrials are among us; after investigating an alarming abduction case in Massachusetts, Paul unearths long-buried files that could lead to an alien cover-up all the way to the White House.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban treks deep into the woods of the Midwest looking for Bigfoot; he cuts through hoaxes, pranks and misinformation in search of evidence to prove the mysterious creature's existence once and for all.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates a reported surge of demonic activity in America that is overwhelming the Catholic Church; Paul follows leads from Gary, Ind., to Mineral Wells, Texas, where he steps outside his comfort zone and into an alleged portal to hell.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: Rumors of a secret US military program to develop super soldiers with psychic powers exploded in the 1970s; Paul Beban sets out to expose the truth and gains access to a modern-day US government initiative to create the superhuman army of the future.

programme.desc: Experts investigate whether an interdimensional portal in the Alaska Triangle led to the disappearance of an airplane carrying 44 military personnel in 1950.

programme.sub-title: The Hairyman of Port Chatham and Frozen in Ice

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle
programme.desc: Most waterways of Alaska are still unexplored; local folklore tells of hidden channels and monstrous beasts lurking in the depths; one of the most terrifying of all those beasts is said to live in Lake Iliamna.

programme.desc: Amy and Steve travel to Springfield, Ohio, where a man claims a malicious spirit is threatening to destroy his home, his health and his marriage; he fears for his life and that of his wife if the escalating paranormal activity is not stopped.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Amy and Steve head to Discovery Bay, Calif., where a woman claims a paranormal presence killed her father; with her whole family suffering from mysterious physical attacks, she is worried her son may fall victim next.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Dakota meets the team in Tennessee to investigate the dark corridors of Brushy Mountain State Penitentiary; Chelsea has a confrontation with an entity inside James Earl Ray's cell; Tanner is threatened; Dakota's fear experiment takes a turn.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Dakota, Chelsea and Tanner explore the Old South Pittsburg Hospital in Tennessee; Dakota must prepare his sister, Chelsea, for a confrontation with a specter on the third floor that is said to attack only women.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team revisits the St. Albans Sanatorium, a place so awful that Chelsea vowed she would never go back; considered to be the most haunted place on the East Coast, it is said to be filled with hundreds of entities, including a demonic force.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team encounters its darkest, most-terrifying paranormal activity at a West Virginia sanitarium; the team is tormented by unexplained screams, disembodied chanting, and a voice that almost pushes it to the edge of madness.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team heads to Moundsville, W.Va., to investigate what was once one of the top 10 most-violent prisons in the United States; Dakota fears he may have to leave some part of his soul behind after he is targeted in a physical attack.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team's road trip takes them to Lancaster, Ohio, to investigate a house of horrors; after Dakota instructs each member to explore the property all alone; Alex encounters something so evil it won't be believed if not caught on video.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Dakota, Chelsea and Tanner investigate one of the most haunted locations in Michigan, Eloise Psychiatric Hospital; the team begins to lose its grip on reality while being subjected to screams, slamming doors and rampant poltergeist activity.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: Dark forces conspire against the team as it investigates the Madison Seminary, one of the most-haunted locations in Ohio; terrifying voices, shadow figures and physical contact with a demonic entity leave them stunned and shaken to the core.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team heads to Pennsylvania to investigate a former home for the destitute and elderly, determined to conquer the terror inside; but things go horribly wrong during a dire paranormal-induced emergency.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team investigates a Texas hospital that has a gruesome history, including a brutal double homicide; the abandoned building's chapel may house a demonic entity.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: After many nights of torment by the paranormal, Alex finally gets his chance to pick a haunted location for the team to investigate; he has planned the most terrifying experiment for Dakota yet at an infamous Idaho prison.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team may shatter as it arrives at a deserted West Virginia hospital known for its brutal deaths and grisly amputations.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team heads to Pennsylvania to investigate a former home for the destitute and elderly, determined to conquer the terror inside; but things go horribly wrong during a dire paranormal-induced emergency.

programme.title: Destination Fear
programme.desc: The team investigates a Texas hospital that has a gruesome history, including a brutal double homicide; the abandoned building's chapel may house a demonic entity.
